'''vangate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:girlfully|girlfully]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-ng-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:girlfully|girlfully]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vangate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:vangate|vangate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vangatesher|vangatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vangatesherĂ«m|vangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vangatero|vangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vangateshĂ«|vangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vangateshĂ«m|vangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivangatero|gokivangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivangateshĂ«|gokivangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivangateshĂ«m|gokivangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govangankerom|govangankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govangankeshĂ«|govangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govangankeshĂ«m|govangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govangankeya|govangankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vangaterom|vangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vangatemu|vangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vangateya|vangateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivangaterom|gokivangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivangatemu|gokivangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivangateya|gokivangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:vangangate|vangangate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vangangatesher|vangangatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vangangatesherĂ«m|vangangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vangangatero|vangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vangangateshĂ«|vangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vangangateshĂ«m|vangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivangangatero|gokivangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivangangateshĂ«|gokivangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivangangateshĂ«m|gokivangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govangangankerom|govangangankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govangangankeshĂ«|govangangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govangangankeshĂ«m|govangangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govangangankeya|govangangankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vangangaterom|vangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vangangatemu|vangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vangangateya|vangangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivangangaterom|gokivangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivangangatemu|gokivangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivangangateya|gokivangangateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:vĂŠngĂŠte|vĂŠngĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vĂŠngĂŠtesher|vĂŠngĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m|vĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠngĂŠtero|vĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|vĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|vĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠngĂŠtero|gokivĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|gokivĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|gokivĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govĂŠngĂŠnkerom|govĂŠngĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«|govĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m|govĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govĂŠngĂŠnkeya|govĂŠngĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠngĂŠterom|vĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠngĂŠtemu|vĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vĂŠngĂŠteya|vĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠngĂŠterom|gokivĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠngĂŠtemu|gokivĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivĂŠngĂŠteya|gokivĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:vafngafte|vafngafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vafngaftesher|vafngaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafngaftesherĂ«m|vafngaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafngaftero|vafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vafngafteshĂ«|vafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafngafteshĂ«m|vafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafngaftero|gokivafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivafngafteshĂ«|gokivafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafngafteshĂ«m|gokivafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govafngafnkerom|govafngafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govafngafnkeshĂ«|govafngafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govafngafnkeshĂ«m|govafngafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govafngafnkeya|govafngafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafngafterom|vafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafngaftemu|vafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vafngafteya|vafngafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafngafterom|gokivafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafngaftemu|gokivafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivafngafteya|gokivafngafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
